backend/main.mo: Root Motoko actor that composes the blob storage mixin to form the backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (3D game hook, weapons, AI difficulty, arena scene) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build-planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the 'Arcade Hub — Play Classic Games' title, Google Fonts preconnect hints, and a root div that mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with 15 game routes (lobby, snake, tic-tac-toe, memory match, stickman archers, OvO, Mario, Pokémon, slope, 1v1-lol, Minecraft, Retro Bowl, Among Us, FNAF, Rocket Soccer League) wrapped in the shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout with a sticky retro arcade header containing desktop and mobile-responsive nav links for all 15 games, a main content slot, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Reusable leaderboard component that reads top scores from localStorage, displays up to 5 ranked entries with neon accent styling, and supports both higher-is-better and lower-is-better modes.
Score submission form that accepts an uppercase nickname (max 10 chars), persists the entry to localStorage via useLocalLeaderboard, and shows a confirmation state after saving.
frontend/src/hooks/use1v1Lol3DGame.ts: A React hook implementing a 3D first-person shooter game using Three.js, managing game state for a player vs. AI bot with multiple weapons, difficulty levels, projectile physics, and a game loop.
frontend/src/hooks/use1v1LolGame.ts: A React hook implementing a 2D side-scrolling shooter game with a player and AI character, handling physics, collision resolution, shooting, wall placement, and AI behavior on a canvas.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and returns an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmongUsGame.ts: A React hook implementing an Among Us-inspired game where the player moves around a canvas completing tasks while avoiding an impostor, with win/lose conditions and keyboard input handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useFnafGame.ts: A React hook implementing a Five Nights at Freddy's-style survival game with animatronic movement, door controls, power management, camera switching, and night timer logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useFootballBrosGame.t: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state with support for delegation validation and configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: A React hook that manages a local localStorage-based leaderboard for a given game, supporting adding scores and retrieving the top 10 entries sorted by score.
frontend/src/hooks/useMinecraftClassic3D: A React hook implementing a 3D Minecraft-like game using Three.js, including block types, world generation, mob AI (zombies, skeletons, spiders), arrows, inventory, and crafting recipes.
frontend/src/hooks/useMinecraftClassicGa: An empty placeholder file with no content.
frontend/src/hooks/useOvoGame.ts: A React hook implementing a 2D platformer game with multiple levels, player physics (gravity, wall jumps, coyote time), moving platforms, hazards, and portals rendered on an HTML canvas.
frontend/src/hooks/usePokemonGame.ts: A React hook implementing a turn-based Pokémon-style battle game with a roster of six typed Pokémon, move PP tracking, damage calculation, and battle phase management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A placeholder file noting that leaderboard data is handled via localStorage in useLeaderboard.ts rather than backend queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetroBowlGame.ts: A React hook implementing a retro American football game with play selection (run/short-pass/long-pass), aiming, ball physics, defender AI, and drive/down tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useRocketSoccerLeague: A React hook implementing a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game with physics-based car and ball simulation, AI opponent, boost mechanics, goal detection, and a match timer.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlopeGame.ts: React hook implementing the core game logic for a slope/ball-rolling game, including state management, obstacle generation, collision detection, steering controls, and speed acceleration.
frontend/src/hooks/useStickmanArchersGam: React hook managing state and logic for a stickman archers game, supporting single-player and two-player modes with aiming, shooting, arrow physics, AI behavior, and win/loss detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSuperMarioGame.ts: React hook implementing a Super Mario-style platformer game with level building, player physics, enemy movement, coin collection, camera scrolling, and win/game-over conditions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a retro arcade dark theme using Tailwind, custom OKLCH color tokens for neon accents, and reusable component classes for neon-styled buttons and arcade UI elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query, Internet Identity authentication, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AmongUsGame.tsx: React page component rendering an Among Us-inspired game on an HTML canvas, handling room/corridor drawing, task stations, player and impostor rendering, and displaying score submission and leaderboard on game over.
frontend/src/pages/FnafGame.tsx: A Five Nights at Freddy's-inspired canvas-based game page that renders an office view with doors and a camera system, managing game state (power, night timer, doors) and showing score submission and leaderboard on game over or win.
frontend/src/pages/FootballBrosGame.tsx: An empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for a Football Bros game page.
frontend/src/pages/GameLobby.tsx: The main game lobby page that displays a grid of available games (Snake, Tic-Tac-Toe, Memory Match, etc.) with styled cards and navigation links, plus a leaderboard component.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: A memory card-matching game page where players flip cards to find emoji pairs, tracking move count, detecting completion, and offering score submission and a leaderboard.
A 3D voxel/Minecraft-style game page using React Three Fiber with instanced mesh rendering for a block world, supporting block placement/removal, a hotbar, inventory, crafting, mobs, and arrows.
frontend/src/pages/OneLolGame.tsx: A 3D first-person arena shooter game page (1v1.lol-style) built with React Three Fiber, featuring an enclosed arena with obstacles, a bot opponent, projectile system, weapon selection, difficulty configs, and score submission.
frontend/src/pages/OvoGame.tsx: React page component for the OVO precision platformer game, rendering a canvas-based game with level selection, mobile touch controls, death/time tracking, and score submission on game completion.
frontend/src/pages/PokemonGame.tsx: React page component for a turn-based Pokémon battle game, displaying roster selection, battle arena with HP bars and battle log, and score submission after the game ends.
frontend/src/pages/RetroBowlGame.tsx: React page component for a retro American football game, rendering a canvas-based field with QB, receivers, defenders, and ball, with play selection UI and score submission on game over.
frontend/src/pages/RocketSoccerLeagueGam: React page component for a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game using React Three Fiber, featuring a chase camera, player/AI cars, boost effects, and score submission on match end.
frontend/src/pages/SlopeGame.tsx: React page component for a 3D endless runner slope game using React Three Fiber, where a ball navigates a lane with obstacles, tracking score and triggering a game-over screen with score submission.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: Implements a classic Snake game using an HTML canvas with neon visuals, handling game loop, collision detection, score tracking, and integrating ScoreSubmission and Leaderboard components.
frontend/src/pages/StickmanArchersGame.t: Renders a two-player Stickman Archers game on a canvas, drawing the background, stickman characters with bows, and delegating game logic to the useStickmanArchersGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/SuperMarioGame.tsx: Renders a side-scrolling Mario-style platformer on a canvas, drawing platforms, coins, enemies, the player, and a HUD, while delegating game logic to the useSuperMarioGame hook with score submission support.
frontend/src/pages/TicTacToeGame.tsx: Implements a two-player local Tic-Tac-Toe game with win/draw detection, neon-styled cell highlighting, and a restart button.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom arcade and neon color tokens, pixel and sans font families, neon box-shadow utilities, and animation keyframes using oklch color values.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and architecture for a 3D 1v1 battle game built with Three.js/React Three Fiber, documenting existing features like weapons, AI difficulty levels, arena scene, and HUD components.
